title: Auction of Government of India Dated Securities
description: Government of India (GoI) has announced the sale (re-issue) of two dated securities for a notified amount of ₹29,000 crore as per the following details: Sr No Security Date of Repayment Notified Amount (₹ Crore) GoI specific Notification Auction Date Settlement Date 1 6.68% GS 2040 Jul 07, 2040 17,000 F.No.4(1)-B(W&M)/2026 dated April 27, 2026 April 30, 2026 (Thursday) May 04, 2026 (Monday) 2 7.43% GS 2076 Jan 19, 2076 12,000   Total   29,000       2. GoI
